title: Fort Lister Mulanje: History, Hiking & the Dramatic Gap Descent
meta_title: Fort Lister Mulanje: History, Hiking & Gap Descent
meta_description: Explore Fort Lister Mulanje — the colonial anti-slavery fort, Grand Traverse exit point, and dramatic Gap descent to Phalombe. Planning tips and where to stay.
author: The Thyolo House
excerpt: Fort Lister sits on the eastern flank of Mount Mulanje, where colonial anti-slavery history meets one of Malawi's most dramatic hiking descents. This guide covers the fort's origins, the famous Fort Lister Gap trail, and how to plan your visit from Thyolo.
